description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with a docker:dind service. Define variables RELEASE_IMAGE and TEST_IMAGE that point to the GitLab Container Registry paths. Set three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs "docker build -t ${TEST_IMAGE} ." then "docker push $TEST_IMAGE" (login is performed in before_script). In the test stage add two jobs: test_failure runs "docker run ${TEST_IMAGE} ./reproduce.py release-1.0.3" and test_success runs "docker run ${TEST_IMAGE} ./reproduce.py release-1.0.1". In the release stage add a release job that only runs on the master branch or tags, executing "docker pull $TEST_IMAGE", "docker tag $TEST_IMAGE $RELEASE_IMAGE", and "docker push $RELEASE_IMAGE".
